sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4494" key="a)llote/rmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοτέρμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τέρμα</etym>) <sense id="n4494.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foreign</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γῆ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0343.tlg001:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ezek.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Exag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
